title: rubus × certus
intro: Rubus × certus, a hybrid of the Rubus genus, is a type of bramble or thorn-bearing shrub that is often used in traditional herbal medicine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anthocyanins and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × certus include reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as potentially lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health. Rubus × certus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in jams and preserves, although its medicinal properties are typically extracted through cold-pressing or solvent extraction.
